description_long: This is a vintage-style, light blue flatbed truck with wooden side rails and a wooden cargo bed. The cab features a boxy design with a prominent front grille, round headlights, and side mirrors extending from both sides. The truck has two axles and four wheels, with the rear bed designed for hauling goods or materials. The side of the truck displays the text 'GENERAL HAULIERS' in yellow, while the rear and front signage reads 'TOONY & CO GENERAL HAULIERS.' The cab has a single door on each side and a simple, utilitarian dashboard visible through the windshield. The overall design suggests a utilitarian vehicle suitable for urban deliveries or light transport.
description: A vintage light blue flatbed truck with wooden side rails, yellow 'GENERAL HAULIERS' signage, and a simple, boxy cab. The truck is designed for hauling goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, wooden side rails, and 'GENERAL HAULIERS' signage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open wooden cargo bed and 'TOONY & CO GENERAL HAULIERS' text on the tailgate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the cab door and wooden rails.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille, headlights, windshield, and 'TOONY & CO GENERAL HAULIERS' sign above the cab.
